name: tool registry stays aligned with the coding tool bundle
judgeRubric: The coding tool bundle and the tool registry should expose the same expected default tools without missing critical coding entries.

name: the api tools list exposes every coding tool
judgeRubric: The API tools endpoint should enumerate the coding tools completely and report the correct coding count.

name: find discovers nested glob matches
judgeRubric: The find tool should return both matching files, including the nested path, for the requested glob.

name: extract_document reads a local smoke fixture
judgeRubric: extract_document should preserve the text payload, recognize the text format, and report the downloaded filename.

name: parallel_ripgrep merges overlapping pattern ranges
judgeRubric: parallel_ripgrep should detect both search patterns across the matching files and report the merged range metadata.

name: background_tasks can start, inspect, and stop a process
judgeRubric: background_tasks should start a process, list it as active, surface startup or keepalive logs, and stop it cleanly.

name: notebook_edit creates and replaces notebook content
judgeRubric: notebook_edit should create a notebook, replace the first cell, and persist the updated markdown cell content.

name: ask_user returns a pending questionnaire payload
judgeRubric: ask_user should return a pending questionnaire with one user-visible question instead of silently succeeding.

name: status summarizes git porcelain output
judgeRubric: status should surface the dirty file count and branch context for a repository with one untracked file.

name: websearch fails clearly without an EXA key
judgeRubric: websearch should fail fast with a clear EXA API key requirement instead of returning a vague or unrelated error.

expected.error: EXA_API_KEY environment variable is required. Get your key at https://dashboard.exa.ai/api-keys

name: codesearch fails clearly without an EXA key
judgeRubric: codesearch should fail fast with a clear EXA API key requirement instead of returning a vague or unrelated error.

expected.error: EXA_API_KEY environment variable is required. Get your key at https://dashboard.exa.ai/api-keys

name: webfetch fails clearly without an EXA key
judgeRubric: webfetch should fail fast with a clear EXA API key requirement instead of returning a vague or unrelated error.

expected.error: EXA_API_KEY environment variable is required. Get your key at https://dashboard.exa.ai/api-keys
